name: Public Joint Stock Company Detsky Mir
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Detsky Mir, a multi-format digital retailer, operates a chain of children's clothing and goods retail stores. The company offers toys and games, products for newborns, apparel and footwear, art and craft sets, recreational goods, car seats, furniture, and stationery, as well as pet goods. As of March 1, 2021, it operated through a network of 834 Detsky Mir stores located in 331 cities in Russia, Kazakhstan, and Belarus; 16 Detmir Pickup stores; and 21 Zoozavr stores, as well as detmir.ru, an online store. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Moscow, Russia.
